title: cyperus gayi
intro: Cyperus gayi, also known as the Burdick's love grass or the Burdick's sedge, is a species of sedge in the family Cyperaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cyperus gayi include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant are made by drying and grinding the leaves and roots, which can be used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams.
